description_long: This wallet is a bright red, rectangular, hinged case with a hard shell exterior, reminiscent of a compact electronic organizer. The left side features a large blue dome button and three smaller colored indicator lights (green, yellow, and red) above a recessed area that resembles a control pad. The interior surface displays a printed panel with grayscale illustrations and text, possibly mimicking a digital screen or information card. The right side of the wallet is a flat, solid panel with a rectangular indented area, suggesting a compartment or slot. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a playful, tech-inspired aesthetic. The wallet appears to be made primarily of plastic, with some metallic or glass elements for the buttons and indicators.
description: A bright red, hard-shell wallet with a hinged design, blue dome button, indicator lights, and a printed interior panel. Its sleek, tech-inspired look features clean lines and a playful, modern aesthetic.
description_view_0: The wallet is open, showing the interior with a printed panel, blue dome button, three indicator lights, and a control pad on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the blue dome button, and indicator lights are visible on the edge.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the open wallet, with the blue dome button and indicator lights more prominent, and the printed panel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front-facing view of the open wallet, displaying the printed panel, control pad, and the clean, flat right panel.
